summary: Static compatibility boundary for Quasar demo mode. Paths listed as anchor-layout-only or blocked must not be treated as Quasar submission-ready until ported/verified.

demoCriticalPaths.surface: shared Quasar instruction-data builders for registry/reputation/attestation
demoCriticalPaths.reason: Uses one-byte Quasar discriminators and fixed-size argument layouts from Quasar parity source/tests. Does not claim PER compatibility.
Wraps shared Quasar registry instruction data with account metas/order from Quasar parity source/tests. Covers registry only; reputation/attestation wrappers remain future work.
Selects Quasar registry wrapper when PROGRAM_TARGET is quasar; preserves Anchor builder only for legacy-anchor mode.
Constructs demo-agent register instructions with Quasar register data when PROGRAM_TARGET is quasar and preserves Anchor encoding for legacy mode.

demoCriticalPaths.surface: shared instruction builders and account decoders
demoCriticalPaths.reason: Uses Anchor SHA256 global/account discriminators and Anchor account layout comments. Quasar program ID selection is wired, but data layout compatibility is not verified.

Registration transaction construction now routes through target-aware `buildAgentRegistrationInstruction`, using Quasar registry wrapper/data in explicit Quasar mode and Anchor data only in legacy mode.

demoCriticalPaths.surface: onboarding registration and attestation confirmation/dispute builders
demoCriticalPaths.reason: Builds transactions with shared Anchor-layout builders.
Uses buildAttestQualityData from lib/program.ts and Anchor-style account metas.
Local commit/reveal data builders use Anchor discriminators from IX.
Filters by Anchor account discriminator and decodes Anchor account layout.
Filters by Anchor account discriminator and decodes Anchor account layout.
Demo-agent registration now routes through target-aware helper using Quasar fixed-size one-byte register data in explicit Quasar mode; send remains operator-triggered only.
Builds multiple instructions inline and includes PER flow. Requires Quasar builder port and PER semantics verification before use as Quasar proof.

submissionReadyRule: submissionReady may not be true while any demoCriticalPaths entry is anchor-layout-only or blocked-pending-quasar-port.
